eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Frio, TX; at 11:58 AM on JUL 17, 2026 Effective until 1:58 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is an Emergency Flood Warning.

At this time,  possible flooding is expected to occur in the area. 
If you are in a low-lying location, near the Leona River in Frio County be prepared move to higher ground.
Do not attempt to drive through flooded roads. Turn Around, Dont Drown. Just a few inches of moving water can sweep away a vehicle.

If you are told to evacuate, leave immediately and follow directions from emergency management and law enforcement.

This has been an Emergency Flood Warning. Stay alert, stay informed, and stay safe.
